message:
refactor(parser): extract gitGraph command parsing into two-phase parse/lower architecture

Introduce GitGraphCommand enum and split gitGraph parsing into
parse_gitgraph_command (returns typed command) and lower_gitgraph_command
(applies to builder). This mirrors the block-beta refactoring pattern,
replacing inline command dispatch with structured command objects.
Adds unsupported-syntax warning for unrecognized gitGraph lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
